scripts.build: npm run build -w @wmai/mobile && npm run build -w @wmai/admin
scripts.build:api: npm --prefix apps/api ci && npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @wmai/mobile && npm run typecheck -w @wmai/admin && npm run typecheck -w @wmai/api-node
scripts.termux:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
